frame.description: single leaned-back rifle recoil pose with the rifle shifted rearward and a compact muzzle flare

panzerfaustOnBack.method: reuse the accepted launcher layer and mask over the normal recoil body

runtimeGeometry.transform: rotate source 90 degrees counterclockwise, resize full canvas to 222x105, composite at -39,+2

notes: The second generation restores the approved brown-wood and dark-metal rifle palette.
The high-resolution alpha matte is contracted and thresholded before runtime downscaling to avoid magenta fringe.
The Panzerfaust recoil frame is deterministic: only the previously accepted launcher layer is composited over the new body frame.
Both five-frame strips are live runtime assets; the recoil frame appears only for the opening 20 percent of the recoil envelope.
The sprite origin shifts the torso 10 world pixels forward, then the firing frame kicks the whole sprite 4 world pixels backward.
